data.body:
PREREQUISITE FOUNDATIONS SHIPPED — epic + children realigned (2026-06).

Three foundations this epic was written to build ON have landed; updated the epic description (new '## Prerequisite foundations — NOW SHIPPED' section + corrected the now-false 'none wired into rebar today' polyglot claim + the spun-out carve-out line) and the affected children to consume them rather than build them. The closed prerequisite epics themselves were NOT touched.

1. Code-grounding evidence oracle — epic 8f6c (CLOSED). src/rebar/grounding/: polyglot, fail-open, three-valued oracle (refute_absence/applies/scan) — T0 deps existence (deps.dev + optional syft), T1 symbol/import/file resolution (universal-ctags), Engine B detectors (OpenGrep/ast-grep, scc/lizard), grounding_info static contract. Layer-1 P2/P3/P4 CONSUME it; this epic adds NO new tool integrations. T2 LSP-semantic resolution = follow-on epic 850f (open).

2. LLM workflow engine — epic e6d9 (CLOSED, 'Workflow engine v2'). src/rebar/llm/workflow/: declarative IR + interpreter/executor, run_workflow (CLI + MCP), PydanticAI runner + structured-output stack, Inspect-AI eval seam (src/rebar/llm/eval.py). The gate runs AS a workflow on this engine.

3. Prompt storage / contract-bearing prompt model — epic da27 (all 11 children closed; epic closed THIS session with a signed completion verdict). src/rebar/llm/prompts.py: front-matter closed-key contracts (inputs/outputs schema-names, execution_mode, category), derived prompt index + CI drift gate, .rebar/prompts/ override resolution, canonical writer + editor authoring. The criteria registry's 'reuse rebar.llm catalog/contracts/prompt/runner' is now this concrete machinery.

Child edits: 012e (Layer-1 floor) now consumes the 8f6c oracle facade (was: wrap solidlsp/ast-grep/syft/scc/lizard as new integrations); ca03 (orchestrator) builds on the shipped engine + prompt library; 7284 (eval suite) wires the shipped eval seam.

Prototype harness for validation: docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/harnesses/final_gate_3pass.py against criteria_v8.json (the same harness da27's own plan-review run used).
